children.heading: Purpose
children.label: a Purpose
children.text: It is the purpose of this section to authorize the Secretary of Agriculture to establish an integrated research, education, and extension competitive grant program to provide funding for integrated, multifunctional agricultural research, extension, and education activities.

children.heading: Competitive grants authorized
children.label: b Competitive grants authorized
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations to carry out this section, the Secretary may award grants to colleges and universities (as defined in ), 1994 Institutions, and Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities on a competitive basis for integrated agricultural research, education, and extension projects in accordance with this section.section 3103 of this title

children.heading: Criteria for grants
children.label: c Criteria for grants
children.text: Grants under this section shall be awarded to address priorities in United States agriculture, determined by the Secretary in consultation with the Advisory Board, that involve integrated research, extension, and education activities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (3), with respect to a grant under this section that provides a particular benefit to a specific agricultural commodity, the recipient of the grant shall provide non-Federal matching funds (including funds from an agricultural commodity promotion, research, and information program) equal to not less than the amount of the grant.

children.heading: In-kind support
children.label: 2 In-kind support
children.text: Non-Federal matching funds described in paragraph (1) may include in-kind support.

children.label: A
children.text: the results of the grant are of a particular benefit to a specific agricultural commodity, but those results are likely to be applicable to agricultural commodities generally; or

children.label: II
children.text: deals with scientifically important research; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the recipient is unable to satisfy the matching funds requirement.

children.heading: Term of grant
children.label: e Term of grant
children.text: A grant under this section shall have a term of not more than 5 years.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this section for each of fiscal years 1999 through 2023.
